text:
Country: UAE
Category: Policy changes

Policy Type: 
Policy Change: Implementation of Foreign Direct Investment (FDI) Law allowing 100% foreign ownership in selected sectors
Effective Date: 2020

Source: https://u.ae/en/information-and-services/business/doing-business-in-the-uae/foreign-direct-investment

Notes: Improved foreign investment environment and reduced reliance on local partners
